appBar.generateAria: Open prompt sheet to generate an image

toast.localImportInvalid: Only PNG, JPEG, or WebP is supported
toast.localStorageFull: Local storage is full — recent state may not persist.
toast.refLimitExceeded: References are capped at 5. Extra images were dropped.
toast.refTooLarge: Image is too large. Convert to JPEG/PNG or lower the resolution and try again.
toast.refNotBase64: Image file is corrupted or uses an unsupported encoding.
toast.refEmpty: Empty image file. Please pick a different file.
toast.refHeicUnsupported: HEIC/HEIF is not supported. Convert to JPEG or PNG and try again.
toast.noCurrentImageForRef: No current image to use as reference.
toast.addedCurrentAsRef: Added current image as a reference.
toast.nodeRootCreated: Created a first node from this image.
toast.sessionReloadedElsewhere: Graph version changed, so the latest graph was reloaded.
toast.openGeneratedDirFailed: Could not open the image folder. Run ima2 doctor to check the storage path.
toast.forkStarted: Prompt imported. Edit and generate again.
toast.forkStartedNoPrompt: Image attached as reference. Type a prompt and generate.
toast.continueAsUrlStarted: Provider URL set as reference. Generate to use the original image.
toast.continueAsUrlExpired: The provider URL has expired. Use Continue here instead.
toast.comfyExportInvalidUrl: ComfyUI URL must be a local HTTP address.
toast.comfyExportInvalidImage: This saved image cannot be sent to ComfyUI.
toast.comfyExportImageNotFound: Saved image file was not found.
toast.comfyExportFailed: Could not upload image to ComfyUI.

size.title: Size
size.hint: 16px steps, max edge 3840, ratio up to 3:1, 655K–8.29M pixels
size.squareMaxHint: Square maximum is {size} because of the 8.29M pixel limit.

sizeConfirm.title: Size adjustment required
sizeConfirm.body: The requested size is outside the image generation limits.
sizeConfirm.reasonPixels: The maximum pixel limit is exceeded.
sizeConfirm.reasonMinPixels: The requested image has too few pixels.
sizeConfirm.reasonMin: The size is below the minimum.
sizeConfirm.reasonMax: The size is above the maximum.
sizeConfirm.reasonSnap: The size must align to 16px increments.

moderation.title: Moderation
moderation.explain: Auto uses the standard safety filter. Low relaxes limits so borderline prompts may pass through.

count.title: Count
count.highCountHint: Higher counts can take longer with references or high quality.

multimode.label: Sequence
multimode.tooltip: Generate ordered stages from one prompt
multimode.highCountHint: Higher stage counts can take several minutes.
multimode.composerAriaLabel: Sequence prompt composer, up to {count} separate stages
multimode.promptPlaceholder: Describe the sequence. Use Count with Sequence off for same-prompt batches.
multimode.promptPlaceholderWithRefs: Describe the staged sequence using the attached references.
multimode.toggleDisabledGenerating: Wait for the current generation to finish

metadata.restoreBody: This image contains ima2 generation metadata. Apply its prompt and settings, or attach it as a reference only.
metadata.unsupportedFormat: Only PNG, JPEG, and WebP metadata can be restored.

onboarding.title: Hello! First time here?
onboarding.body: Sign in to start generating. You can connect ChatGPT, Grok, or Gemini.

readiness.title: Generation readiness
readiness.openTitle: Check provider, auth, model, and web-search readiness
readiness.settingsBody: Open a compact popup with provider, auth, model, reasoning, and web-search state.
readiness.grokApiBody: Runs through bundled progrok: mandatory search, grok-4.3 image+text tool planning in English, then xAI Images API. Attached references use xAI image editing so i2i context is preserved.

history.deleteSequenceConfirm: Delete all {count} images in this multimode sequence?

prompt.label: Prompt
prompt.placeholder: Describe the image you want. Drag & drop or paste to attach reference images...
prompt.placeholderWithRefs: Describe what to do with the attached images...
prompt.useCurrentTitle: Use current result as a reference
prompt.continueTitle: Continue from current result as reference
prompt.storyboardTitle: Enable storyboard mode — maintains character and scene continuity across sequential frames
prompt.urlRefActiveTitle: Provider URL reference is active and will be used instead of attached image refs. Click to clear.
prompt.dropHere: Drop to attach as reference (up to {max})

canvas.imageViewerAria: Generated image viewer. Use left and right arrow keys to move between images.

blank.title: Blank canvas
blank.subtitle: Sketch on white paper, then continue from it.

drop.hint: Drop image to add to gallery

toolbar.label: Canvas annotation tools
toolbar.cleanupPickHint: Click the background on the image
toolbar.editMaskUnsupported: Masked edit is not supported by the current image provider

version.usingAsReference: Canvas version is ready as a reference

gallery.title: Gallery
gallery.searchDisabledPlaceholder: Search is disabled in session view
gallery.emptyAll: No images yet. Create one first.
gallery.sessionPaginationHint: Session view uses the current page. Switch to Date view to load older images.
gallery.loadOlderFailed: Could not load older gallery items.
gallery.storageNoticeRecoverable: Sorry for the scare. Recent versions moved the gallery folder from the installed package to your user data folder. Your old images may still be in the previous generated folder. Run ima2 doctor or open the recovery guide.
gallery.storageNoticeNotFound: Sorry for the scare. We could not find a previous generated folder on this machine. If the old global install folder was replaced during update, automatic recovery may not be possible. Run ima2 doctor and check the recovery guide for manual search steps.
gallery.storageNoticeUnknown: Storage status could not be checked. If the gallery looks empty after an update, run ima2 doctor to inspect the image folder.
gallery.openCardNewsSetFailed: Could not open the Card News set.

empty.currentSession: No images in this session yet.

node.duplicateBranchTitle: Duplicate as a new branch root
node.newVariationTitle: Create a new sibling variant under the same parent
node.nodeRefsUnsupportedForEdit: Extra references are only supported on root nodes for now.
node.nodeRefsUsedWithParent: Used together with the parent image.
node.classicRefsParkedBody: These images belong to the classic composer and are inactive in node mode.

nodeBatch.parentRequired: {count} selected node(s) need a ready parent image first.
nodeBatch.stopQueued: The current node will finish, then the remaining queue will stop.
nodeBatch.staleBecauseParentChanged: An upstream node was regenerated; refresh this node when needed.

edge.parentConflict: A node can only have one parent connection.

provider.oauthNotReady: GPT OAuth proxy is not ready yet.
provider.codexLoginHint: Run `codex login` in your terminal, then refresh this page.
provider.oauthStarting: GPT OAuth proxy is starting. Try again in a few seconds.
provider.serverUnreachable: Cannot reach the server. Make sure the backend is running.
provider.apiInvalid: API key is missing or invalid. Check OPENAI_API_KEY in the server's .env.
provider.grokNoImageModel: No Grok image generation model found.
provider.grokOfflineHint: Run `ima2 grok login` once if needed, then start `ima2 serve`; ima2 starts the bundled Grok proxy automatically.
provider.grokManagedByIma2: Grok runs locally inside `ima2 serve` through the bundled progrok proxy at 127.0.0.1:18645.
provider.grokClassicOnly: Grok image generation is not available in this surface.
provider.grokClassicOnlyHint: Use a generation surface with Grok enabled.
provider.grokCompatBody: ima2 serve manages the bundled progrok proxy at 127.0.0.1:18645. Grok always searches before image generation, sends attached references into the grok-4.3 planner, keeps them through xAI image editing, and maps size to xAI aspect ratio/resolution. Output format, moderation, and reasoning are OpenAI-provider settings only.
provider.settingsBody: Choose which provider future generation requests use.
provider.agyCompatBody: 1024x1024 fixed, JPEG output, max 3 refs. No quality/size control.
provider.agyCompatBodyLong: 1024x1024 fixed output, JPEG format, max 3 reference images. No web search, no quality/size control.
provider.geminiApiCompatBody: Google Gemini API. Supports aspect ratio and resolution control from 512px to 4K.
provider.geminiApiCompatBodyLong: Google Gemini API direct. Supports nano-banana-2 (Flash) and nano-banana-pro (Pro), with aspect ratio and resolution control from 512px to 4K.
provider.gptCompatBody: OpenAI image generation via Responses API. Supports quality, size, format, moderation, and web search settings.

result.continueHereTitle: Import this image's prompt and keep working
result.continueAsUrlTitle: Continue using the original provider URL (expires in 1 hour)
result.animateTitle: Generate a Grok video from this image (image-to-video)
result.firstNodeTitle: Send this image to Node Mode as a ready first node
result.sendToComfyUITitle: Upload this saved image to local ComfyUI
result.permanentDeleteConfirm: Permanently delete "{filename}"? This cannot be undone.

session.deleteConfirm: Delete session "{title}"? This cannot be undone.
session.assetAbortedError: Generation did not finish cleanly. Retry from this node.

agent.title: Agent
agent.slashDesc_question: Ask a question without generating images
agent.emptyChat: Enter a message to start image work.
agent.memoryItemStyle: Style locks are retained in image context.
agent.memoryItemSubject: Subject locks are restored after resume.

cardNews.composerHint: Templates are visual snapshots; output size is set separately.
cardNews.briefPlaceholder: Describe the card news content, required points, and exclusions.
cardNews.missingGeneratedCard: The generation response did not include this card.
cardNews.newTemplateLater: Custom templates are planned after the dev MVP
cardNews.emptyBody: Use the left setup panel to prepare the card deck.
cardNews.headline: Headline
cardNews.lockedHelp: Locked cards are excluded from batch generation and retry.

planner.jsonOnlyHelp: Draft creates JSON only. Images are generated later.

sidebar.quickSettingsAria: Choose model and reasoning effort. Current model {model}, reasoning {effort}
sidebar.nodeModeHint: In node mode, click a node to edit its prompt and generate. Settings on the right panel (quality/size) apply to every new result.

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Account, display, and future workspace controls live here so the generator stays focused.

account.oauthBody: GPT OAuth generation runs through your Codex OAuth session. You can switch to API-key mode when a valid key is configured.
account.apiBody: ima2-gen can use this API key for generation, edit, multimode, and node requests through the Responses API.
account.grokBody: Uses progrok at the configured local port for xAI Images API generation.
account.agyInstalledBody: Login status can't be detected. Run `agy login` in your terminal if generation fails.
account.agyFineprint: Antigravity models and image quota are billed separately.

imageModel.title: Image model
imageModel.body: Choose the image model used for future generations. Selecting a Grok model switches the provider to Grok.
imageModel.gpt53CodexSpark: GPT-5.3 Codex Spark — unsupported for images
imageModel.unsupportedHelp: Grok models use xAI's Images API through the bundled local proxy. GPT models use OpenAI Responses image generation.

vertex.label: Vertex AI (Service Account)
vertex.placeholder: Paste your Google Cloud service account JSON { "type": "service_account", ... }

reasoning.title: Reasoning effort
reasoning.body: Higher effort spends more reasoning tokens on planning, web search, and prompt enrichment before generating.

webSearch.title: Web search
webSearch.body: Use live search before generation for real people, brands, products, places, and recent events.

grokCompatibility.title: Grok compatibility
grokCompatibility.body: Grok image generation first runs mandatory web search, then sends text and attached images to a local image-tool planner that writes the final image prompt in English. Attached references route through xAI image editing; size is mapped to aspect ratio/resolution. Output format, moderation, and reasoning are only used by GPT OAuth and API key providers.

grokPlanner.title: Grok planner model
grokPlanner.body: The model used for search and image/video prompt planning. grok-4.3 is the default and supports image input for I2V/Ref2V planning.

gallery.defaultScopeBody: Choose what the gallery shows when you open it.

appearance.themeBody: Pick a theme style and brightness for this device.
appearance.historyStripLayoutBody: Choose how the compact history strip sits beside the workspace.

language.title: Language
language.body: Switch the UI language without changing generated content.

future.title: Reserved for later
future.body: Future provider repair and workspace controls will appear here when they become useful.

nodeCanvas.hint: Drag a handle into empty space to branch. Press Delete or Backspace to remove.

unknown.title: An unexpected error occurred
unknown.body: Please try again shortly. If it persists, copy the raw error message below and report it.

moderationRefused.title: Prompt blocked by moderation
moderationRefused.body: Soften the wording or rephrase. Sensitive/violent content in reference images can also trigger this.
moderationRefused.bodyInput: Your prompt text was caught by the input filter. Try rephrasing or using different wording.
moderationRefused.bodyOutput: The generated image was caught by the output filter. Try changing the style or quality settings.

emptyResponse.title: No image was returned
emptyResponse.body: Codex responded but didn't include image data. This isn't a moderation block — it's likely a transient hiccup or an unsupported size/quality/model combination. Retry, or try a different size or model.

streamParseFailed.title: Could not parse the image response stream
streamParseFailed.body: Response data arrived, but the app could not read the image stream cleanly. This can happen with a proxy or transient stream transport issue.

imageToolNotCalled.title: The image tool was not called
imageToolNotCalled.body: The response completed, but no image-generation tool call was observed. Retry the same prompt, or try another model/search setting.

webSearchOnlyResponse.title: The image tool was not called
webSearchOnlyResponse.body: Only web search ran; the image-generation tool did not. Turn off search or retry the request.

imageToolFailed.title: The image tool call failed
imageToolFailed.body: The image-generation tool was called, but it ended in a failed state. If this repeats, report it with `ima2 doctor image-probe --json` output.

imageToolNoResult.title: The image result was empty
imageToolNoResult.body: The image tool call completed but did not include image data. This can point to an unsupported option combination or account capability issue.

oauthImageCapabilityUnavailable.title: This account may not have image-tool access
oauthImageCapabilityUnavailable.body: GPT OAuth is connected, but this account/model combination may not be entitled to use image generation. Compare with API-key mode or another model.

responsesStreamError.title: The image response stream ended with an error
responsesStreamError.body: OpenAI returned an error event inside the response stream. Retry shortly, and check the raw error details if it persists.

upstream5xx.title: OpenAI is currently busy
upstream5xx.body: Retrying usually resolves this. Check status.openai.com if it persists.

authChatgptExpired.title: Codex ChatGPT session expired
authChatgptExpired.body: Run `ima2 setup` in your terminal (option 1), then reload this app.

authApiKeyInvalid.title: API key authentication failed
authApiKeyInvalid.body: The key is missing, invalid, revoked, out of quota, or tied to the wrong org. Switch to GPT OAuth or update the configured API key.

networkFailed.title: Network connection failed
networkFailed.body: Could not reach OpenAI or the local runtime service. Reload first; if it persists, check VPN/firewall and the port shown by `ima2 doctor`.

oauthUnavailable.title: GPT OAuth proxy unavailable
oauthUnavailable.body: The GPT OAuth proxy is starting, unavailable, or moved to a fallback port. Reload first; if it persists, run `ima2 doctor` and check the reported GPT OAuth URL.

invalidRequest.title: Image request needs changes
invalidRequest.body: One or more generation parameters are invalid. Check the raw error details below, then edit the prompt or size and try again.

apikeyDisabled.title: API-key mode is unavailable
apikeyDisabled.body: This build supports API-key generation, but the current request could not use a configured key. Switch to GPT OAuth or update the API key.

agyGenerationFailed.title: Gemini generation failed
agyGenerationFailed.body: The Antigravity CLI returned an error. Check that the agy binary is installed and your Gemini account is active.

agyTimeout.title: Gemini generation timed out
agyTimeout.body: The agy process did not respond within the timeout window (360s). Try again or check the agy CLI status.

agyProcessError.title: Gemini process error
agyProcessError.body: The agy CLI exited with an unexpected error. Verify the binary is working with 'agy --version'.

agyQuotaExhausted.title: Gemini quota exhausted
agyQuotaExhausted.body: You have exhausted your Gemini image generation capacity. Your quota will reset automatically — check the reset timer in the error details.

promptLibrary.title: Prompt Library
promptLibrary.name: Name
promptLibrary.dropImport: Drop .txt, .md, or .markdown files to import prompts
promptLibrary.importPreviewEmpty: Drop files or enter a GitHub path to preview candidates.
promptLibrary.importSelectAtLeastOne: Select at least one prompt to save.
promptLibrary.transparentUnsupportedGptImage2: Transparent background is not supported by gpt-image-2
promptLibrary.discoveryRequiresPaths: Add reviewed file paths before default search.
promptLibrary.folderBrowseHint: Loads supported files from a GitHub folder
promptLibrary.folderTooManyFiles: Too many files; showing a limited set.

promptBuilder.title: Prompt Builder
promptBuilder.subtitle: Refine prompts through multi-turn context.
promptBuilder.newWorkTitle: Start a new work without image context
promptBuilder.empty: Describe the direction you want. I will include your current prompt and settings as context.
promptBuilder.placeholder: What kind of image should we make?
promptBuilder.applied: Builder suggestion applied to the main prompt
promptBuilder.inserted: Builder suggestion inserted as a prompt block
promptBuilder.removeScopeImage: Remove selected image from builder context
promptBuilder.attachmentOnlyMessage: Use the attached file as context and help with the prompt

workspace.defaultDesc: Standard generation workflow with sidebar composer.
workspace.promptStudioDesc: Prompt builder panel, grouped history, and enhanced viewer.
